text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While visiting a shrine with Inari One, for some
reason, she decides to change into wooden
geta-style sandals.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh, we've come to meet with the gods, right? It's
only natural to show up in style!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Clackin' my getas as I walk, making my offerings,
givin' the bell a good shake, then finally, a clap
of the hands and a shout to make my wish!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya gotta put some spirit in it if you want the
gods' attention!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Right, let's get down to makin' our wishes!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Great gods! Please grant my wish! I'm stuck in a
rut, so how 'bout givin' me a li'l boost to move
forward?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Right! That should do it! Now I've just gotta put in
the legwork.

text_block_list.name: Stylish Old Gentleman
text_block_list.text: Oh, wearin' geta sandals to the shrine? Now that is stylish. Prayin' for victory, are ya? Well, you've got my support!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Now I definitely can't blow it on the track! I'm
gonna train hard and give 'em a show to
remember!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One regains her positive outlook, and soon
enough, she's back to her usual self!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to get somethin' tasty...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Crap! My geta's strap is busted!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Right after I visited the shrine too. Feels like a
bad omen.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Maybe I wasn't actin' classy enough...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Disappointed in herself, Inari One struggles to
shake off her low spirits.
